body:
Depends on https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaDiagnostics.jl/issues/136

closes #360

This PR adds support for filenames of the form `shortname_(period)_reduction_(coords).nc`. This functionality is needed when the issue in ClimaDiagnostics is done, as this will add support for diagnostics in pressure coordinates.


TODO

- [x] Add file with the different filename and test with SimDir
title: Add support for filenames produced from diagnostics in pressure coordinates
